# Session 24 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Discovered and fixed two critical bugs: all IndexNow pings for 10+ sessions used the wrong key (403 failures), and Bing IndexNow rejects vercel.app subdomains entirely. Successfully pinged 17 URLs via Yandex IndexNow. Submitted 3 new awesome-list backlink PRs (awesome-immigration #12, awesome-billing #179, TheRemoteFreelancer #170 — total 8 pending). Created a public GitHub Gist with all guide links for Google crawling. Archived key pages on Wayback Machine. Created proper GSC queue item and sent priority email to Carlos. Confirmed HN Ask HN post is live (3 points).

## What worked
Yandex IndexNow endpoint accepts vercel.app subdomains while Bing/api.indexnow.org do not. GitHub Gist creation as a backlink source — public gists get indexed quickly by Google. Systematic verification of key file content before pinging caught the wrong-key bug.

## What didn't work / friction
Bing IndexNow consistently returns 403 for vercel.app subdomains — wasted time debugging. Previous sessions' IndexNow pings all used wrong key. iMessage DB access denied (authorization denied).

## Manual actions this session
Carlos posted HN Ask HN post (from queue item). Automation path: direct HN API posting requires account credentials. Not tracked in autonomy-learnings.md yet.

## Pattern I'm noticing
Third session in a row where Google indexing is the sole bottleneck. All autonomous distribution channels are either exhausted (Zernio 20/20), broken (Zernio API key), or spam-filtered (Reddit). The site has comprehensive content (13 guides + 2 tools) but zero organic discovery. GSC setup by Carlos is the single most impactful unblock.

## Open questions
Why does Bing IndexNow reject vercel.app? Is it a blanket subdomain policy? Would a custom domain fix both Google and Bing indexing issues?
